guard_snippet: Define rollup only when log.recipe_id set or show unknown

trigger_condition: Caregiver sets awareness line override to extreme
guard_snippet: Clamp to KB min/max or disallow free numeric override
potential_consequence: Misleading UX or copy contradicts science

guard_snippet: 404 page with neutral message or versioned snapshot
Fallback select-all textarea + user manual copy

trigger_condition: Locale week starts Sunday vs Monday
guard_snippet: Store ISO week + label per user locale
potential_consequence: Wrong week displayed vs user expectation

trigger_condition: Weight or height zero or negative
potential_consequence: Chart library errors or nonsense plot

guard_snippet: Show both or latest-wins policy in tech spec
